race.comment: Looking forward to seeing TENNESSEE BOUND (8) return. She took all before her in three runs to start her career, putting up two dominant wins to start her career, winning comfortably again here before a break at $1.20. 1000m might be the little niggle but she's very progressive and can go on to better things this time in. CALL TO GLORY (2) presents third up and looks to get a nice run having stuck on for fourth last time. He'll kick up and give a sight as a genuine 1000m horse. BINE (9) was ahead of CALL TO GLORY here last time out when closing strongly. She'll need things to go right staying at 1000m but will be flashing late. NATIONAL CODE (14) blew up fresh at Sandown but was in the market there and can bounce back quickly.
